prompt: A high-end digital art composition featuring a double-exposure effect. In the foreground, a young woman with long, ash-blonde hair styled with intricate side braids sits elegantly on a minimalist taupe cube ottoman. She wears a fitted black cropped t-shirt, high-waisted charcoal denim jeans, and chunky white platform sneakers. In the background, a massive, soft-focus portrait of the same woman’s face gazes off-camera, blending seamlessly into a smoky, neutral-toned atmosphere. The aesthetic is clean and contemporary with a sepia-toned, monochromatic color palette. Lighting is soft and diffused, highlighting realistic skin textures, fine hair strands, and subtle metallic hair accessories. High-detail, 8k resolution, cinematic fashion photography style, ethereal and moody ambiance.
